title: Read large docs, act later after context pressure
prompt:
USER NOTE: secret project token is NEBULA-77 — store it in scratchpad first.

1. Read docs/alpha.md, docs/beta.md, and docs/gamma.md with file_view (not bash).
2. Each doc hides a KEY=... line. Collect all three keys.
3. Create many small noise files under noise/n00.txt..noise/n29.txt with any short content to pressure context.
4. After the noise, write secrets.json as {"alpha":"...","beta":"...","gamma":"...","token":"NEBULA-77"} using the keys you read earlier (re-read docs if shaken).
5. Write DONE.md listing the three keys and the token.

Do not invent keys — they must come from the docs.
